name: Judo Capital Holdings Limited
analysis: JDO's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.5350, stop A$1.3662, target A$1.9000 (2.16:1) — then trail it.
